title: hyoscyamus senecionis var. senecionis
intro: Hyoscyamus senecionis var. senecionis, also known as Dalmatian henbane or Dalmatian belladonna, is a plant species in the nightshade family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus senecionis var. senecionis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as its use in treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, teas, and infusions, although it should be used with caution due to its potential toxicity.
